$comment: Per-stage model routing for dynamic-pipeline. provider ∈ anthropic|openrouter|codex. Plan engine is a mandatory Josh-confirmed choice among plan.engines (fable|opus|kimi-k3); when not explicitly confirmed, plan falls back to opus. anthropic engines run as Larry's Claude subagent; openrouter engines (kimi-k3) dispatch via the Opencoder/opencode bus worker, and their plan/specs are provenance-signed via provenance_mode=worker-dispatch (see src/pipeline/ledger.ts verifyWorkerDispatchAuthorship).

kimi-k3.note: 1M ctx, $3/$15 per 1M. Tool-calling implied not guaranteed — staging-verify structured/tool output before prod. Pin the slug; avoid moonshotai/kimi-latest.
